records.question: Which FDA approved medicines with the trade name Saphris interact with the enzyme that produces δ-Aminolevulinic acid?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.product = 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid' AND medicine.fda_approved = 'Yes' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Saphris'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.id
FROM medicine m
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction mei ON m.id = mei.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme e ON mei.enzyme_id = e.id
WHERE m.Trade_Name = 'Saphris'
AND m.FDA_approved = 'yes'
AND e.Product = 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid'

records.question: Which medicines named Carpipramine that are not FDA approved act as inhibitors of ALA dehydratase, where that enzyme produces Porphobilinogen and is located on chromosome 9q34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.product = 'Porphobilinogen' AND enzyme.name = 'ALA dehydratase' AND medicine.fda_approved = 'No' AND enzyme.chromosome = '9q34' AND medicine.name = 'Carpipramine' AND medicine_enzyme_interaction.interaction_type = 'inhibitor'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.id
FROM medicine m
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction mei ON m.id = mei.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme e ON mei.enzyme_id = e.id
WHERE m.name = 'Carpipramine'
AND m.FDA_approved = 'no'
AND mei.interaction_type = 'inhibitor'
AND e.name = 'ALA dehydratase'
AND e.Product = 'Porphobilinogen'
AND e.Chromosome = '9q34'
